summary: Tested Document Builder, Upsells API, and Competitor Analysis features. All 19 backend tests pass, all 9 frontend E2E tests pass (3 new Document Builder tests + 6 existing core-flows tests). Added data-testid attributes to DocumentBuilder.jsx for testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar overlay intercepts pointer events on buttons when viewport is small. Buttons at bottom of form pages may be blocked by sidebar footer.
ui_bugs.workaround: Use JavaScript click or force: true in Playwright tests

seed_data_creation: Test documents created via API during testing (auto-cleaned by unique UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features working correctly: 1) Document Builder - templates load, form wizard works, preview page has PDF download and send for signature. 2) Upsells API - returns all 6 service categories (movers, internet, insurance, utilities, cleaning, storage) with provider details. 3) Competitor Analysis - returns recommended price, title, description, selling points via AI. Note: Perplexity API integration is MOCKED - falls back to local data when no API key.

Document_Builder_Template_Selection.notes: All 4 templates (RTB-1, RTB-7, RTB-26, RTB-30) load correctly with descriptions

Document_Builder_Form_Wizard.notes: RTB-1 has 7 sections, form fields render correctly, auto-populates landlord info from user

Document_Builder_Preview.notes: Shows document preview, Download PDF button, Print button, Send for Signature section

Document_Builder_PDF_Generation.notes: POST /api/document-builder/pdf generates valid PDF with form data

Document_Builder_Send_Signature.notes: POST /api/document-builder/send creates document with pending_signature status, sends email

Upsells_Services_API.notes: GET /api/upsells/services/{city} returns movers, internet, insurance, utilities, cleaning, storage

Upsells_Quote_Request.notes: POST /api/upsells/request-quote records quote request with provider details

Competitor_Analysis_API.notes: POST /api/ai/competitor-analysis returns AI-generated title, description, price suggestion (Perplexity MOCKED)

mocked_integrations.fallback: Uses local database listings and default Vancouver market rates
